text:
MCP is how AI stops guessing and starts using tools.

This week's AI field guide is about MCP Explained Without the Hype.

The carousel gives you the short version.
The guide gives you the practical map.

Comment MCP and I will send you the full AI field guide.

comment_to_dm.dm_prompt: Here is the AI field guide: https://www.layer8culture.io/guides/mcp-explained-without-the-hype/ What are you trying to get better at with AI right now?

slides.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic Layer8Culture carousel slide in a deep black and deep navy environment with electric blue accents, premium creator-tech atmosphere, human-centered AI themes, strong negative space, and a distinct scene. Topic: MCP Explained Without the Hype. Slide idea: MCP WITHOUT HYPE. Use abstract tool-connected AI workflows, terminal windows as soft shapes, node graphs, premium studio details, and builder energy. No rendered text. Make this slide feel like a wide cinematic system map in motion.
slides.headline: MCP WITHOUT HYPE
slides.subtext: AI needs tools, not just text.
